stemHtml:
Which statement is correct regarding a propeller?

I. Increasing tip speed to supersonic speed increases propeller noise.
II. Increasing tip speed to supersonic speed increases propeller efficiency.

options.a: I is correct, II is incorrect.
options.b: I is incorrect, II is correct.
options.c: I is incorrect, II is incorrect.
options.d: I is correct, II is correct.
